title: Senior AI Solutions Architect
overview: Lead the design and implementation of production-grade Generative AI solutions and RAG pipelines for Enterprise clients.
aboutRole: As a Senior AI Solutions Architect, you will sit at the intersection of product, engineering, and data science, orchestrating complex LLM-based systems.
description: We are seeking a visionary technical leader to architect scalable AI systems. You must have deep experience with LLM orchestration (LangChain/LlamaIndex), Vector Databases, and productionizing RAG systems using AWS and Kubernetes.
keyResponsibilities: Architect and build multi-agent LLM systems with LangChain
Design and optimize high-performance RAG pipelines using Pinecone
Lead a team of 4 senior engineers on Model Orchestration
Implement robust security protocols for private-data AI processing
Conduct deep architectural reviews of model latency and cost pipelines
responsibilities: Lead technical execution of enterprise AI projects from discovery to production scaling.
education: Masters in Computer Science or Equivalent Engineering Degree
